src: 🚀 A simple way to launch, train, and use PyTorch models on almost any device and distributed configuration, automatic mixed precision (including fp8), and easy-to-configure FSDP and DeepSpeed support
ja: 🚀 ほぼあらゆるデバイスと分散構成でPyTorchモデルの起動・学習・利用を簡単に行える方法。自動混合精度（fp8含む）、簡単に設定できるFSDPとDeepSpeedサポートを提供
